methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran dominates the threat landscape as external strike pressures and internal security breaches converge.
bullets: Israeli lobbying for expanded strikes against Iranian infrastructure under the Trump administration elevates immediate cross-border escalation risks.
Suspected Mossad infiltration and unexplained killings during domestic protests indicate severe internal security fractures across Iran.
A high-profile kidnapping in Baghdad and an Armenian court ban on a historical documentary highlight persistent militant violence and political instability.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor Iranian border sectors for retaliatory strikes or protest spillover following infrastructure targeting and infiltration reports.
